2605.04665.title: Paraphrase-Induced Output-Mode Collapse: When LLMs Break Character Under Semantically Equivalent Inputs
2605.04665.paper_summary: When the substantive content of a request is rewritten, do large language models still answer in the format the original task asked for? We find that they often do not, even at temperature zero. On a 150-query evaluation over five compact 2025-era LLMs and four task types, we observe a systematic failure mode we call prompt-variant output-mode collapse: when a closed-form prompt asks for a bare label or a single choice token, content-preserving prompt variants can push the model into conversational prose, the requested format dissolves, and exact-match evaluation pipelines silently misjudge the result. To make this measurable, we release PARACONSIST, a 900-prompt benchmark of 150 base queries with five lexical, syntactic, and semantic-expansion prompt variants each, and a Semantic Consistency Score that decomposes prompt-variant robustness into answer consistency, sentence-BERT semantic similarity, and length stability. Under a whole-word answer-set match, only ~22% of closed-form variant responses preserve the ground-truth label inside their output, while ~78% drift away from the answer space entirely. In our pool, the dominant predictor of collapse is task structure rather than model identity, with model differentiation jointly carried by answer consistency and length stability. Robustness audits should therefore track response-mode preservation as a first-class reliability target alongside answer accuracy.
2605.04665.paper_summary_zh: 當請求的實質內容被重寫時，大型語言模型是否仍然按照原始任務要求的格式回答？我們發現它們通常不會，即使在溫度為零的情況下。在對五個2025年時代的緊湊型LLM和四種任務類型進行的150個查詢評估中，我們觀察到一種系統性的失敗模式，我們稱之為提示變體輸出模式崩潰：當一個封閉式提示要求一個簡單標籤或單一選擇標記時，保持內容的提示變體可以將模型推向對話散文，請求的格式解體，精確匹配的評估管道默默地錯判結果。為了使這一點可測量，我們發布了PARACONSIST，一個包含150個基本查詢的900個提示基準，每個查詢有五個詞彙、句法和語義擴展的提示變體，以及一個語義一致性分數，將提示變體的穩健性分解為答案一致性、句子-BERT語義相似性和長度穩定性。在整詞答案集匹配下，只有約22%的封閉式變體回應在其輸出中保留了真實標籤，而約78%則完全偏離了答案空間。在我們的樣本中，崩潰的主要預測因素是任務結構而非模型身份，模型區分則由答案一致性和長度穩定性共同承擔。因此，穩健性審核應該將回應模式的保持作為一個一級可靠性目標，與答案準確性並列。
2605.04665.author: Aofan Liu et.al.
